/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/perf-io.dir/perf/perf-io.cc.o" -o /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/utils/perf/ns3.46-perf-io-default   -L/Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-core-default.dylib
